ROOT_EU.title: EU Funding Programmes
ROOT_EU.summary: EU funding programmes for 2021–2027 offer billions in grants, loans, and guarantees across sectors like research, digital transformation, and green energy, managed either directly by the Commission or by national authorities. Explore programmes → pillars → clusters → calls.

HE_ROOT.title: Horizon Europe
HE_ROOT.summary: Horizon Europe is the world's largest research and innovation programme running from 2021 until 2027, providing over £80 billion in funding to address some of the greatest global challenges.

PILLAR_P1.title: Pillar I: Excellent Science
PILLAR_P1.summary: Supports frontier research, researcher mobility and training, and world-class research infrastructures.

PILLAR_P2.title: Pillar II: Global Challenges & European Industrial Competitiveness
PILLAR_P2.summary: Addresses societal challenges and strengthens industrial competitiveness via thematic clusters and missions.

Cluster_4.title: Cluster 4
Cluster_4.summary: Digital, Industry & Space cluster: supports R&I on digital technologies, key enabling technologies, industrial transformation, and space.

DEP.title: Digital Europe
DEP.summary: Funds deployment of digital capacity and technologies across Europe (AI, cybersecurity, advanced digital skills, interoperability).

ERASMUS.title: Erasmus+
ERASMUS.summary: Supports education, training, youth, and sport cooperation projects and partnerships across Europe.

PILLAR_P3.title: Pillar III: Innovative Europe
PILLAR_P3.summary: Boosts breakthrough innovation and scale-up capacity via the European Innovation Council (EIC), the European Innovation Ecosystems (EIE), and the European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT), strengthening pathways from research to market.

PILLAR_WIDERA.title: Widening Participation & Strengthening the ERA (WIDERA)
PILLAR_WIDERA.summary: Improves R&I performance in Widening countries by strengthening capacity, excellence, and networking, while supporting reforms and actions that advance the European Research Area (ERA).

CEF.title: Connecting Europe Facility (CEF)
CEF.summary: Supports the deployment and upgrade of trans-European networks and infrastructures—primarily transport, energy, and digital connectivity—enabling cross-border integration, resilience, and strategic autonomy.

CREA.title: Creative Europe (CREA)
CREA.summary: Supports Europe’s cultural and creative sectors by funding cross-border cooperation, content development and distribution, audience development, and media actions, with an emphasis on diversity, innovation, and European added value.

EURATOM.title: EURATOM Research and Training
EURATOM.summary: Funds nuclear research and training to improve safety, security, safeguards, and radiation protection, and to advance fusion and fission knowledge where relevant, ensuring high standards and responsible use.

MISS.title: EU Missions (Horizon Europe)
MISS.summary: Mission-oriented R&I portfolios designed to deliver measurable results by a target date, combining research, innovation, deployment, and citizen engagement to address major societal challenges at scale.

Cluster_1.title: Cluster 1: Health
Cluster_1.summary: Improves and protects citizens’ health and wellbeing through prevention, diagnostics, treatments, and resilient health systems, including digital health and preparedness.

Cluster_2.title: Cluster 2: Culture, Creativity and Inclusive Society
Cluster_2.summary: Strengthens democratic governance, cultural heritage, creative industries, and social inclusion by addressing inequality, participation, skills, and societal resilience.

Cluster_3.title: Cluster 3: Civil Security for Society
Cluster_3.summary: Enhances Europe’s resilience to security threats by supporting capabilities for disaster risk reduction, cybersecurity, crime and terrorism prevention, and secure societies while safeguarding fundamental rights.

Cluster_5.title: Cluster 5: Climate, Energy and Mobility
Cluster_5.summary: Accelerates the green transition through clean energy, climate action, sustainable mobility, and resilient systems, supporting decarbonisation, circularity, and climate neutrality goals.

Cluster_6.title: Cluster 6: Food, Bioeconomy, Natural Resources, Agriculture and Environment
Cluster_6.summary: Supports sustainable food systems and bioeconomy pathways, biodiversity and ecosystem restoration, and resilient agriculture and resource management aligned with environmental and climate objectives.

ERC.title: European Research Council (ERC)
ERC.summary: Funds frontier research conducted by top-level scientists, promoting excellence and innovation in all scientific disciplines.

EIE.title: European Innovation Ecosystems (EIE)
EIE.summary: Supports the development of innovative ecosystems that foster collaboration between academia, industry, and public stakeholders to drive research and innovation.

EIT.title: European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT)
EIT.summary: Promotes innovation and entrepreneurship across Europe by integrating education, research, and business through Knowledge and Innovation Communities (KICs).

MSCA.title: Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions (MSCA)
MSCA.summary: Supports researcher mobility, training, and career development across all disciplines and sectors, fostering international and intersectoral collaboration.

RI.title: Research Infrastructures (RI)
RI.summary: Supports the development and operation of world-class research infrastructures, enabling cutting-edge research and innovation across disciplines and sectors.

WIDERA.title: Widening Participation & Strengthening the ERA (WIDERA)
WIDERA.summary: Improves R&I performance in Widening countries by strengthening capacity, excellence, and networking, while supporting reforms and actions that advance the European Research Area (ERA).

INFRA.title: Infrastructure
INFRA.summary: Supports the development and operation of world-class research infrastructures, enabling cutting-edge research and innovation across disciplines and sectors.
